title: fizzbuzz
subject:
Write a program that takes one integer N as a command-line argument and prints the numbers from 1 to N, one per line. For multiples of 3 print "Fizz" instead of the number, for multiples of 5 print "Buzz", and for multiples of both print "FizzBuzz".

Example:
  $ python3 fizzbuzz.py 5
  1
  2
  Fizz
  4
  Buzz
